pages.text: The Memory Card copies and pastes machine configurations between Mekanism machines. It stores configuration and upgrades from one machine and applies them to others.

pages.title: Copying
pages.text: To copy configuration:$(br)$(li)Sneak + Right-click a machine: Copy config and upgrades to the card$(br)$(br)The tooltip will show the source machine type.

pages.title: Pasting
pages.text: To paste configuration:$(br)$(li)Right-click a machine: Apply stored config to the target machine (consumes upgrade cards if needed)$(br)$(br)Requires matching machine type and sufficient upgrade cards in inventory.

pages.title: Clearing
pages.text: To clear stored configuration:$(br)$(li)Sneak + Right-click air: Clear the stored config$(br)$(br)This resets the card so you can copy a new machine.
